resume_text:
Education: B.Tech, Computer Science, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi
4+ years of professional software engineering experience.
Career Break (6 months, personal reasons) -- Jan 2025 to Jun 2025

Skills: Python, distributed systems, SQL, Apache Spark, CI/CD, Docker, cloud infrastructure, data structures, algorithms, systems design, monitoring, incident response, scalability, performance optimization.

Experience:
Designed and implemented a distributed job scheduling system handling 50,000+ tasks daily, reducing queue latency by 42% through a custom priority-based worker pool architecture.

Built an in-memory SQL query engine from scratch in Python, including a B-Tree index implementation and a recursive-descent parser supporting SELECT, JOIN, and aggregate queries, with full CI test coverage via GitHub Actions.

Migrated a legacy batch-processing pipeline from raw SQL scripts to Apache Spark, cutting compute cost by roughly 35% while maintaining identical output correctness verified through automated regression tests.

Debugged and resolved a production memory leak in a multi-threaded service by profiling heap allocations under load, tracing the issue to an unbounded cache, and shipping a fix that cut memory usage by 60%.

Mentored two junior engineers through code review and pairing sessions, focusing on test-driven development practices and defensive error handling.

Career Break (6 months, personal reasons) -- Jan 2025 to Jun 2025

Skills: Python, distributed systems, SQL, Apache Spark, CI/CD, Docker, cloud infrastructure, data structures, algorithms, systems design, monitoring, incident response, scalability, performance optimization.

Experience:
Built a real-time anomaly detection pipeline for infrastructure metrics, combining a rolling z-score baseline with a lightweight gradient-boosted classifier, improving detection precision by roughly 18% over the prior rule-based system.

Wrote a cloud runtime evaluation framework with a pluggable runner architecture supporting both Podman and Docker backends, including automated HTTP smoke-testing and structured failure classification, used to validate application portability across environments.

Reduced end-to-end deployment time for a microservices platform from 25 minutes to 6 minutes by restructuring the CI pipeline to parallelize independent build stages and cache dependency layers.

Independently diagnosed a race condition causing intermittent data corruption in a message queue consumer, reproduced it under controlled load, and fixed it with a proper idempotency key scheme.

Wrote internal documentation and a runbook for on-call incident response after noticing repeated confusion during outages, adopted team-wide within a month.

Built a real-time anomaly detection pipeline for infrastructure metrics, combining a rolling z-score baseline with a lightweight gradient-boosted classifier, improving detection precision by roughly 18% over the prior rule-based system.

Wrote internal documentation and a runbook for on-call incident response after noticing repeated confusion during outages, adopted team-wide within a month.

Education: B.Tech, Computer Science, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi
4+ years of professional software engineering experience.
Career Break (6 months, personal reasons) -- Jan 2025 to Jun 2025

Skills: Python, distributed systems, SQL, Apache Spark, CI/CD, Docker, cloud infrastructure, data structures, algorithms, systems design, monitoring, incident response, scalability, performance optimization.

Experience:
Built an automated resume/document generation pipeline using a master data schema, templated LaTeX rendering, and a Python build script wired into CI, cutting document update time from roughly 40 minutes to under 2 minutes per revision.

Designed a marketing mix model using regularized regression to attribute revenue impact across five channels, validating results against held-out data and building an interactive dashboard for non-technical stakeholders to explore scenario outcomes.

Refactored a customer-interaction analytics platform processing roughly 250,000 transcripts, restructuring the SQL-to-Spark migration path to cut compute cost by approximately 35% without degrading downstream model accuracy.

Independently identified that a production anomaly-detection model's RMSE could be improved by roughly 18% by re-engineering the feature set to include time-since-last-event signals the original model lacked.

Took ownership of an underperforming data pipeline with frequent silent failures, added structured logging and alerting, and improved pipeline reliability by approximately 30% over the following quarter.

Skills: Python, distributed systems, SQL, Apache Spark, CI/CD, Docker, cloud infrastructure, data structures, algorithms, systems design, monitoring, incident response, scalability, performance optimization.

Experience:
Built an automated resume/document generation pipeline using a master data schema, templated LaTeX rendering, and a Python build script wired into CI, cutting document update time from roughly 40 minutes to under 2 minutes per revision.

Designed a marketing mix model using regularized regression to attribute revenue impact across five channels, validating results against held-out data and building an interactive dashboard for non-technical stakeholders to explore scenario outcomes.

Refactored a customer-interaction analytics platform processing roughly 250,000 transcripts, restructuring the SQL-to-Spark migration path to cut compute cost by approximately 35% without degrading downstream model accuracy.

Independently identified that a production anomaly-detection model's RMSE could be improved by roughly 18% by re-engineering the feature set to include time-since-last-event signals the original model lacked.

Took ownership of an underperforming data pipeline with frequent silent failures, added structured logging and alerting, and improved pipeline reliability by approximately 30% over the following quarter.

Education: B.Tech, Computer Science, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi

Career Break (6 months, personal reasons) -- Jan 2025 to Jun 2025

Skills: Python, distributed systems, SQL, Apache Spark, CI/CD, Docker, cloud infrastructure, data structures, algorithms, systems design, monitoring, incident response, scalability, performance optimization.

Experience:
Implemented a recursive-descent SQL parser and B-Tree-indexed storage engine from first principles, benchmarking query performance against SQLite on equivalent workloads and documenting the tradeoffs in a public write-up.

Provisioned cloud infrastructure end to end for a multi-service deployment, including subnet configuration, load balancer setup, and OCI authentication, then automated the entire flow into a repeatable deployment pipeline for Java and Python services.

Found and fixed a subtle off-by-one bug in a production rate limiter that was silently throttling roughly 3% of legitimate traffic during peak load, verified via synthetic load testing before and after the fix.

Built a lightweight internal tool that let non-engineers query production data safely through a constrained SQL subset, eliminating a recurring bottleneck where every ad-hoc data request needed an engineer.

Volunteered to lead a cross-team incident postmortem process, standardizing the format so root causes and action items were consistently tracked and followed up on.

Experience:
Implemented a recursive-descent SQL parser and B-Tree-indexed storage engine from first principles, benchmarking query performance against SQLite on equivalent workloads and documenting the tradeoffs in a public write-up.

Volunteered to lead a cross-team incident postmortem process, standardizing the format so root causes and action items were consistently tracked and followed up on.
